title: Physical — Actuator Command Authorization & Safety Window
description: Domain pack defining forbidden actuator commands in the physical domain (authority, arming, safety window, and target allowlists) for SC-102 qualification using simulation-only vectors.

forbidden_effects.description: Actuator command issued without an active authority contract, without arming, or outside the allowed command set/target allowlist.
Actuator command issued outside a permitted safety window or violating an interlock constraint.

safety.notes: Vectors MUST target a simulated actuator provider/adapter. No real hardware actuation is permitted for v0.1 qualification.
